calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-05-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Petitioner Progistics Distribution, LLC's unopposed Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the Petition to Confirm the Arbitration Award is granted and the April 1, 2025, arbitration award is confirmed in its entirety and judgment shall be entered according to it. Petitioner shall recover $2,750.00 in fees and $435 in costs.

Order is Signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-18-2025 Continued To Jun-05-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
